steps.name: docs-and-ia-reset
steps.summary: Rewrote the IA docs so product management is a top-level domain, inventory is list/history and inbound/outbound centered, settings owns store connections, and legacy 기준 데이터 /integrations ownership is demoted to redirects.

steps.name: navigation-products-and-settings-ownership
steps.summary: Reordered the global nav to keep product management visible, removed the stray settings product-management CTA, and consolidated store-connection ownership inside settings with query-param deep links from legacy routes.

steps.name: inventory-table-and-quick-entry-simplification
steps.summary: Reworked inventory into a dense table-first surface with warehouse/search/status filters, column visibility controls, embedded history, and compact fixed quick-entry sheets without paste-mode or duplicate type toggles.

steps.name: shipping-classification-and-store-connection-merge
steps.summary: Collapsed duplicated settings and shipping chrome by merging store-connection status plus edit forms into single provider surfaces and moving shipping classification, filter, and provider send actions into one preview-focused workspace with deep links for missing connections.

steps.name: regression-and-phase-closeout
steps.summary: Verified the reset by running lint, build, and the full Vitest suite after restoring Homebrew node/npm onto PATH, and synced the docs to the shipped inventory, shipping, and settings patterns.
